seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: New mobile features for AI coding agent include branch/worktree management, goal creation, inline code reviews, side chats, prompt editing, skills/plugins integration, and UI improvements for better workflow on mobile.

seed_expert_discoveries.project: Abacus AI Agent - Claude Fable Mode
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Agent framework launches model routing: triggers high-capability Claude Fable for hard coding tasks while routing others to cheaper models (GPT 5.5, Gemini Flash) for cost efficiency in ChatLLM.
Fable exhibits strong code review capabilities for catching issues pre-prod; non-pay-per-use access enables extensive 'Fable Check' usage revealing shipped code problems.

near_misses.project: Memory Augmented Neural Networks for agents
near_misses.technical_takeaway: Discussion of modern memory architectures (Memory Networks, RETRO, Product Key Memory, Engram) for intrinsic retrieval/continual learning in agents, beyond context RAG.
near_misses.reason: Thoughtful expert commentary on memory innovations but no new repo/framework release in past 24h.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Agentic workflows increase need for orchestration, memory, and persistent compute layers vs simple generative inference.
near_misses.reason: Relevant to agent patterns but general commentary without specific new tool or benchmark.

notes: Seed phase yielded 3 high-signal practical updates from experts on AI coding/agent tools. Global searches returned low relevance/irrelevant posts; no new open-source repos or major breakthroughs in 24h window. Near-misses capture thoughtful but non-innovative content.
